# Sound Credits

The default sound files (`default.wav`, `success.wav`, `error.wav`) are
synthesized programmatically using pure sine-wave tones. They are original
works released under the same MIT license as the git-beep-beep package.

- **default.wav** — soft two-tone chime with exponential decay (880 Hz + 1320 Hz)
- **success.wav** — ascending two-tone notification (880 Hz → 1100 Hz)
- **error.wav** — descending "wah-wah" with vibrato (400 Hz → 320 Hz)

No external samples or audio files were used. These sounds are free of
attribution requirements.
